about.title: Engineering Precision Through Additive Manufacturing
about.description1: The Layer8 Labs specializes in high-quality FDM and SLA 3D printing services for rapid prototyping, engineering applications, low-volume manufacturing, and custom product development.
about.description2: We focus on precision, consistency, material expertise, and premium finishing to deliver reliable manufacturing solutions for creators, startups, engineers, and businesses.

services.title: Architectural Scaled Models
services.description: High-detail architectural and concept scale models for presentations, client demonstrations, urban planning, and real-estate visualization.

services.title: FDM Printing
services.description: Strong, reliable, and functional parts using advanced engineering-grade materials.

services.title: SLA Printing
services.description: High-detail resin printing for aesthetic models, miniatures, and precision parts.

services.title: Product Design
services.description: CAD modeling and product development workflows from concept to manufacturable design.

services.title: Rapid Prototyping
services.description: Fast iteration cycles for startups, engineering applications, and functional testing.

services.title: Low Volume Manufacturing
services.description: Consistent short production runs with precision workflows and repeatable quality.

services.title: Functional Engineering Parts
services.description: Durable mechanical components designed for industrial and engineering use.

reviews.name: Dhirendra Singh
reviews.review:
I am incredibly impressed with this Su-57 Felon 3D-printed model. The level of detail in the digital camouflage is fantastic, and the colors are vibrant and sharp.

​What stands out most is the build quality—it is very durable and feels much sturdier than your average 3D print. It looks amazing on my desk, and I really loved the product. Highly recommended for any aviation fan!

reviews.name: Atindra Mondal
reviews.review: Very impressive work with very innocent behaviour just like my own brother....Once again thank you dada for making this dream beyblade...

reviews.name: Trisha Das
reviews.review:
I am very happy and impressed with this pikachu pokeball 3D print. Quality is really good, despite how it looks it is smooth to the touch and since it has been assembled from parts it gives the overall structure more stability and rigidness.

The experience is very good, happy to add one of my childhood favourite, and will add more in future.

You can also make your own collection of pokaballs.

reviews.name: Snehasish Nath
reviews.review: Amazing service - got my model made so quick while keeping great quality!

reviews.name: Bishwajit Kumar Poddar
reviews.review:
One of the best and most affordable 3D printing services in Kolkata!

I got a custom adapter printed for my DIY air purifier setup using an Atomberg exhaust fan and a Mi air filter. Based on his suggestion, I went with PETG instead of regular PLA — and that turned out to be a brilliant choice.

The adapter has fallen multiple times while cleaning the floor, but it still looks and works perfectly. Super strong print quality, great material recommendation, and excellent overall experience.

Highly recommended if you need durable, well-made 3D printed parts without spending a fortune.

reviews.name: Sam
reviews.review:
Layer8 Labs is my absolute go to place for 3D prints. Gaurav is always eager to help, and the quality of his prints is consistently exceptional. He is incredibly accommodating throughout the entire process.

I remember having an issue with one of my 3D files a while back, and he went completely out of his way to fix the file himself to ensure it turned out perfectly. The prints are always great, the pricing is right on point, and it’s overall a complete pleasure working with him. I would highly recommend Layer8 Labs to anyone looking for a serious, high quality 3D printing service!

faq.question: What file formats do you accept for 3D printing?
faq.answer: We accept most common 3D file formats including STL, OBJ, and STEP. If your file needs repair, we can help prepare it for printing.

faq.question: What materials do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer PLA, PETG, ABS, ASA, Nylon, Carbon-fiber reinforced filaments for FDM, and a selection of standard and engineering resins for SLA.

faq.question: Can you help with design or file fixes?
faq.answer: Yes — we provide CAD adjustments, file repair, and advice on design for manufacturability. Contact us with your requirements.

faq.question: Do you provide batch products manufacturing?
faq.answer: Absolutely, in fact that is one of our strenghts with the quality of machines and materials we use, we can provide very consistent and repitative 3d printed products.
